content_fingerprint: researchers build multi agent system to check cnc part manufacturability on amd mi300x gpus a team from a recent amd developer hackathon on hugging face demonstrated a multi agent ai pipeline that analyzes whether cnc machining designs are actually feasible to manufacture running inference at scale on amd mi300x hardware a developer participating in the lablab ai amd developer hackathon has published a community blog post on hugging face describing a multi agent system called machinacheck that evaluates the manufacturability of cnc machined parts the system was built to run on amd mi300x gpus
